feat.name: Reactive Interference
feat.text: Grabbing a sleeve, swiping with your weapon, or creating another obstruction, you reflexively foil an enemy’s response. If the triggering creature’s level is equal to or lower than yours, you disrupt the triggering reaction. If the triggering creature’s level is higher than yours, you must make an attack roll against its AC. On a success, you disrupt the reaction.

traits.name: Commander
traits.text: This trait indicates abilities from the commander class.

traits.name: Rogue
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the rogue class.

feat.trigger: An adjacent enemy begins to use a reaction
